arts.ttl: AC Milan plan Real Madrid talks over Alex Jimenez transfer terms
arts.sum: AC Milan will open imminent talks with Real Madrid over Alex Jimenez’s future at the San Siro in 2025. The Serie A giants are keen to retain 19-year-old with his current deal in Milan running until 2028 with the option for an additional 12 months. He joined AC Milan on a permanent deal in March […] The post AC Milan plan Real Madrid talks over Alex Jimenez transfer terms appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Milan working to change Alex Jimenez agreement with Real Madrid
